goal: Produce a structured security audit report for the baps framework.
northstar_markdown:
# baps Security Audit

Find vulnerabilities in the baps framework. Focus on:
- Prompt injection paths (model output trusted without validation)
- State mutation bypasses (changes reaching State without going through StateService)
- StateView/State boundary violations (raw State internals leaking into prompts)
- Delta parsing weaknesses (malformed model output accepted as valid)
- Export path traversal (file paths in deltas escaping the output directory)
